id: create-application
title: "Create application"
description: "Create a new *application*"

hide_table_of_contents: true
api: 
sidebar_class_name: "post api-method"
info_path: docs/api/Reference/home-credit-partner-api-order-future
custom_edit_url: null
---

import MethodEndpoint from "@theme/ApiExplorer/MethodEndpoint";
import ParamsDetails from "@theme/ParamsDetails";
import RequestSchema from "@theme/RequestSchema";
import StatusCodes from "@theme/StatusCodes";
import OperationTabs from "@theme/OperationTabs";
import TabItem from "@theme/TabItem";
import Heading from "@theme/Heading";

<Heading
  as={"h1"}
  className={"openapi__heading"}
  children={"Create application"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"post"}
  path={"/financing/v3/applications"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



Create a new *application*

<Heading
  id={"request"}
  as={"h2"}
  className={"openapi-tabs__heading"}
  children={"Request"}
>
</Heading>

<ParamsDetails
  parameters={undefined}
>
  
</ParamsDetails>

<RequestSchema
  title={"Body"}
  body={{"content":{"application/json;charset=UTF-8":{"schema":{"anyOf":[{"type":"object","properties":{"customer":{"type":"object","properties":{"type":{"type":"string","enum":["PERSON","ENTREPRENEUR","LEGAL_ENTITY"],"description":"Customer type"},"person":{"type":"object","properties":{"firstName":{"type":"string","description":"Customer first (given) name. Name SHOULD follow regular expression `^[A-Z├ü-┼Į]'?[- \\u00A0a-zA-Z├Ī-┼Š├ü-┼Į]*[a-zA-Z├Ī-┼Š├ü-┼Į]$`, SHOULD be 2 to 30 characters long and characters SHOULD be in the `ISO 8859-2` character set."},"lastName":{"type":"string","description":"Customer last (family) name. Name SHOULD follow regular expression `^[A-Z├ü-┼Į]'?[- \\u00A0a-zA-Z├Ī-┼Š├ü-┼Į]*[a-zA-Z├Ī-┼Š├ü-┼Į]$`,SHOULD be 2 to 30 characters long and characters SHOULD be in the `ISO 8859-2` character set."},"fullName":{"type":"string","description":"Customer full name, including academical degrees and salutation. Attribute `fullName` is parsed (and eventually shortened) into `firstName` and `lastName`; `fullName` is never returned in response. In case all three attributes are provided, `fullName` is discarded. Full name SHOULD be no longer than 100 characters and characters SHOULD be in the `ISO 8859-2` character set"},"contacts":{"type":"array","description":"Contacts of person.","items":{}},"addresses":{"type":"array","items":{"type":"object","properties":{"city":{"type":"string","description":"City. String values longer than 100 characters will be shortened to 100 characters."},"streetAddress":{"type":"string","description":"Street/city part. String values longer than 100 characters will be shortened to 100 characters."},"streetNumber":{"type":"string","description":"Street number. String values longer than 50 characters will be shortened to 50 characters."},"zip":{"type":"string","description":"Postal code. String values longer than 10 characters will be shortened to 10 characters."},"flags":{"type":"array","items":{"type":"string","enum":["PERMANENT","CONTACT"]},"description":"Types of the address."}}},"description":"Addresses."},"identificationNumber":{"type":"string","description":"Customer's identification number (actually birth number). SHOULD be valid according to the legislation currently in effect. Customer MUST be at least 18 years old."},"ipAddress":{"type":"string","description":"IPv4 or IPv6 address of a customer."},"fingerprintComponents":{"type":"object","properties":{"key":{"type":"string","description":"Key"},"value":{"type":"string","description":"Value"}},"required":["key","value"],"description":"Fingerprints components."}},"description":"REQUIRED for `PERSON` Customer type. If known, customer data MAY be included for a smoother approval process for defined type of customer"},"entrepreneur":{"type":"object","properties":{"businessName":{"type":"string","description":"Name of business company."},"addresses":{"type":"array","items":{"type":"object","properties":{"city":{"type":"string","description":"City. String values longer than 100 characters will be shortened to 100 characters."},"streetAddress":{"type":"string","description":"Street/city part. String values longer than 100 characters will be shortened to 100 characters."},"streetNumber":{"type":"string","description":"Street number. String values longer than 50 characters will be shortened to 50 characters."},"zip":{"type":"string","description":"Postal code. String values longer than 10 characters will be shortened to 10 characters."},"flags":{"type":"array","items":{"type":"string","enum":["PERMANENT","CONTACT"]},"description":"Types of the address."}}},"description":"Addresses."},"businessIdentificationNumber":{"type":"string","description":"Company's identification number (known as I─īO)."},"ipAddress":{"type":"string","description":"IPv4 or IPv6 address of a customer."},"fingerprintComponents":{"type":"object","properties":{"key":{"type":"string","description":"Key"},"value":{"type":"string","description":"Value"}},"required":["key","value"],"description":"Fingerprints components."}},"description":"REQUIRED for `ENTREPRENEUR` Customer type. If known, customer data MAY be included for a smoother approval process for defined type of customer"},"legalEntity":{"type":"object","properties":{"businessName":{"type":"string","description":"Name of business company."},"addresses":{"type":"array","items":{"type":"object","properties":{"city":{"type":"string","description":"City. String values longer than 100 characters will be shortened to 100 characters."},"streetAddress":{"type":"string","description":"Street/city part. String values longer than 100 characters will be shortened to 100 characters."},"streetNumber":{"type":"string","description":"Street number. String values longer than 50 characters will be shortened to 50 characters."},"zip":{"type":"string","description":"Postal code. String values longer than 10 characters will be shortened to 10 characters."},"flags":{"type":"array","items":{"type":"string","enum":["PERMANENT","CONTACT"]},"description":"Types of the address."}}},"description":"Addresses."},"businessIdentificationNumber":{"type":"string","description":"Company's identification number (known as I─īO)."},"ipAddress":{"type":"string","description":"IPv4 or IPv6 address of a customer."},"fingerprintComponents":{"type":"object","properties":{"key":{"type":"string","description":"Key"},"value":{"type":"string","description":"Value"}},"required":["key","value"],"description":"Fingerprints components."}},"description":"REQUIRED for `LEGAL_ENTITY` Customer type. If known, customer data MAY be included for a smoother approval process for defined type of customer"}},"required":["type"],"description":"Customer data. This specification of type of customer is REQUIRED."},"originationContext":{"type":"object","properties":{"channel":{"type":"object","properties":{"type":{"type":"string","enum":["ONLINE"],"description":"Type of origination channel"},"online":{"type":"object","properties":{"approvedRedirect":{"type":"string","description":"URL of the partner used for redirection of the customer back to partner website after the application approval. MUST be a valid URL according to [RFC 3986](https://tools.ietf.org/html/rfc3986). URL SHOULD contain scheme (for example `https://`) otherwise some browsers will not redirect customer correctly.  MUST NOT be longer than 1000 characters."},"rejectedRedirect":{"type":"string","description":"URL of the partner used for redirection of the customer back to partner website after application rejection. MUST be valid URL according to [RFC 3986](https://tools.ietf.org/html/rfc3986). URL SHOULD contain scheme (for example `https://`) otherwise some browsers will not redirect customer correctly. MUST NOT be longer than 1000 characters."},"notificationEndpoint":{"type":"string","description":"URL of the partner used as a notification endpoint for notifying partner about important updates in the application process (approval, rejection, cancellation, etc.). MUST be valid URL according to [RFC 3986](https://tools.ietf.org/html/rfc3986). URL SHOULD contain scheme (for example `https://`). MUST NOT be longer than 1000 characters."}},"description":"Collection of partner's URLs used for redirection of a customer back to a partner website or as a notification endpoint. REQUIRED for ONLINE channel type"}},"required":["type","online"],"description":"Origination channel"},"precheckIds":{"type":"array","items":{"type":"string"},"description":"Array of all precheck ids related to this application. If partner has run Precheck operation with this Customer's data he SHOULD provide precheckId into this attribute. SHOULD be valid precheckId. See Precheck operations and their's response."},"sourceId":{"type":"string","description":"Identifier of source or campaign of lead origin. Partner SHOULD provide valid `sourceId`"},"extendedData":{"type":"array","items":{"type":"object","properties":{"key":{"type":"string","description":"Key"},"value":{"type":"string","description":"Value"}},"required":["key","value"]},"description":"Additional data about application origin. List of supported `keys` for `extendedData`: `utm_source`, `utm_medium`, `utm_campaign`, `utm_term`, `utm_content`, `gclid`, `fbclid`, `url`."}},"required":["channel"],"description":"Additional information about the context of financing application origination (e.g. redirect URL back to partner site)"},"financedSubject":{"type":"object","properties":{"type":{"type":"string","enum":["ORDER"],"description":"Financed subject type"},"order":{"type":"object","properties":{"type":{"type":"string","enum":["STANDARD","BROKERED"],"description":"Type of order."},"number":{"type":"string","description":"Identifier, specified by the partner (e-shop, POS shop, inetmediary). MAY be provided for easier identification of application on partner's side. MUST NOT be longer than 100 characters."},"specificSymbol":{"type":"string","description":"Specific symbol (internal for partner) for reconciliation payment. MUST NOT be longer than 10 characters"},"variableSymbol":{"type":"string","description":"Variable symbol (internal for e-shop) for reconciliation payment. MUST NOT be longer than 10 characters. If empty, `order.number` is used instead. If not provided or not usable (e.g. `order.number` contains only letters) Home Credit internal identifier is used."},"totalPrice":{"type":"object","properties":{"value":{"type":"number","description":"Amount in minor units (13300 represents 133) [ISO 4217](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/ISO_4217)"},"currency":{"type":"string","description":"Amount currency [ISO 4217](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/ISO_4217). Only local currency is allowed (CZK in Czech Republic and EUR in Slovakia)."}},"required":["value","currency"],"description":"Total order amount, including VAT"},"preferredDownPayment":{"type":"object","properties":{"value":{"type":"number","description":"Amount in minor units (13300 represents 133) [ISO 4217](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/ISO_4217)"},"currency":{"type":"string","description":"Amount currency [ISO 4217](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/ISO_4217). Only local currency is allowed (CZK in Czech Republic and EUR in Slovakia)."}},"required":["value","currency"],"description":"Preferred down payment amount (amount SHOULD be rounded to hundreds CZK/ 5 EUR) (example: valid downpayment 35 EUR, invalid downpayment 32 EUR)"},"financings":{"type":"array","items":{"type":"object","properties":{"type":{"type":"string","enum":["INSTALLMENT"],"description":"Financing type"},"amount":{"type":"object","properties":{"value":{"type":"number","description":"Amount in minor units (13300 represents 133) [ISO 4217](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/ISO_4217)"},"currency":{"type":"string","description":"Amount currency [ISO 4217](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/ISO_4217). Only local currency is allowed (CZK in Czech Republic and EUR in Slovakia)."}},"required":["value","currency"],"description":"Financed amount for financing. MAY be provided for orders with only single financing. MUST be provided for orders with multiple financings."},"installment":{"type":"object","properties":{"preferredMonths":{"type":"number","description":"Preferred number of installments (in months)"},"preferredInstallment":{"type":"object","properties":{"value":{"type":"number","description":"Amount in minor units (13300 represents 133) [ISO 4217](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/ISO_4217)"},"currency":{"type":"string","description":"Amount currency [ISO 4217](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/ISO_4217). Only local currency is allowed (CZK in Czech Republic and EUR in Slovakia)."}},"required":["value","currency"],"description":"Preferred down payment amount (amount should be rounded to hundreds CZK/ 5 EUR)"},"productCode":{"type":"string","description":"Product code (obtained from calculation result)."},"flags":{"type":"array","items":{"type":"string","enum":["BUYBACK"]},"description":"Type of installment program. Used typically with multiple financings."}},"description":"Settings for INSTALLMENT Financing type. REQUIRED for INSTALLMENT financing type."}},"required":["type","installment"]},"description":"Information about form of financing ORDER application. MUST be provided with at least `type` of `financing` for orders with only single financing. MUST be provided with at least `amount` and `type` for particular `financing` parts for orders with multiple financings (typically more complicated product, for example Iphone purchase with future buyback)."},"standard":{"type":"object","properties":{"deliveryType":{"type":"string","enum":["PERSONAL_BRANCH","PERSONAL_PARTNER","ONLINE","DELIVERY_CARRIER"],"description":"Type of service used for goods delivery"},"reservationDate":{"type":"string","description":"Date and time until order is reserved. Until `reservationDate` HCO will try to notify partner with Application notification about approval or rejection.After this date and time, e-shop does not guarantee items availability (if application processing is longer, it may endanger order fullfillment)."},"items":{"type":"array","items":{"type":"object","properties":{"code":{"type":"string","description":"Internal code for item (internal to e-shop). Used to better identify the item for future changes. Maximum 100 characters"},"ean":{"type":"string","description":"EAN code. Maximum 32 characters"},"name":{"type":"string","description":"Item name. String values longer than 60 characters will be shortened to 60 characters."},"quantity":{"type":"number","description":"Item quantity. If empty, considered as 1."},"type":{"type":"string","enum":["PHYSICAL","DISCOUNT","SHIPPING_FEE","SALES_TAX","DIGITAL","GIFT_CARD","STORE_CREDIT","FEE","INSURANCE"],"description":"Item type"},"totalPrice":{"type":"object","properties":{"value":{"type":"number","description":"Amount in minor units (13300 represents 133) [ISO 4217](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/ISO_4217)"},"currency":{"type":"string","description":"Amount currency [ISO 4217](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/ISO_4217). Only local currency is allowed (CZK in Czech Republic and EUR in Slovakia)."}},"required":["value","currency"],"description":"Total price for all pieces (including VAT)"},"unitPrice":{"type":"object","properties":{"value":{"type":"number","description":"Amount in minor units (13300 represents 133) [ISO 4217](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/ISO_4217)"},"currency":{"type":"string","description":"Amount currency [ISO 4217](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/ISO_4217). Only local currency is allowed (CZK in Czech Republic and EUR in Slovakia)."}},"required":["value","currency"],"description":"Price per one piece. If empty, automatically considered that `unitPrice` is `totalPrice` / `quantity`."},"producer":{"type":"string","description":"MUST NOT be longer than 50 characters."},"image":{"type":"object","properties":{"filename":{"type":"string","description":"File name."}},"required":["filename"],"oneOf":[{"properties":{"url":{"type":"string","description":"File URL (full)."}},"required":["url"]},{"properties":{"content":{"type":"string","description":"File content (Base64 encoded, maximum size of encoded string is 500kB)"}},"required":["content"]}],"description":"Item image"}},"required":["name","totalPrice"]},"description":"Order items, MUST contain at least one item"}},"required":["items"],"description":"MUST be provided for `order.type` = `STANDARD`"},"brokered":{"type":"object","properties":{"merchantOrders":{"type":"array","items":{"type":"object","properties":{"number":{"type":"string","description":"Internal order number of the merchant (e-shop, POS shop), MAY be provided for easier identification of application on partner's side, MUST NOT be longer than 100 characters."},"name":{"type":"string","description":"Merchant name, MUST NOT be longer than 60 characters"},"logo":{"type":"object","properties":{"filename":{"type":"string","description":"File name."}},"required":["filename"],"oneOf":[{"properties":{"url":{"type":"string","description":"File URL (full)."}},"required":["url"]},{"properties":{"content":{"type":"string","description":"File content (Base64 encoded, maximum size of encoded string is 500kB)"}},"required":["content"]}],"description":"Merchant's logo"},"businessIdentificationNumber":{"type":"number","description":"Business identification number, MUST NOT be longer than 8 digits"},"url":{"type":"string","description":"`URL of the merchant's`web site (e-shop), MUST NOT be longer than 1000 characte`s, MUST be valid URL"},"deliveryType":{"type":"string","enum":["PERSONAL_BRANCH","PERSONAL_PARTNER","ONLINE","DELIVERY_CARRIER"],"description":"Type of service used for goods delivery"},"reservationDate":{"type":"string","description":"Date and time until order is reserved. Until `reservationDate` HCO will try to notify partner with Application notification about approval or rejection.After this date and time, e-shop does not guarantee items availability (if application processing is longer, it may endanger order fullfillment)."},"items":{"type":"array","items":{"type":"object","properties":{"code":{"type":"string","description":"Internal code for item (internal to e-shop). Used to better identify the item for future changes. Maximum 100 characters"},"ean":{"type":"string","description":"EAN code. Maximum 32 characters"},"name":{"type":"string","description":"Item name. String values longer than 60 characters will be shortened to 60 characters."},"quantity":{"type":"number","description":"Item quantity. If empty, considered as 1."},"type":{"type":"string","enum":["PHYSICAL","DISCOUNT","SHIPPING_FEE","SALES_TAX","DIGITAL","GIFT_CARD","STORE_CREDIT","FEE","INSURANCE"],"description":"Item type"},"totalPrice":{"type":"object","properties":{"value":{"type":"number","description":"Amount in minor units (13300 represents 133) [ISO 4217](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/ISO_4217)"},"currency":{"type":"string","description":"Amount currency [ISO 4217](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/ISO_4217). Only local currency is allowed (CZK in Czech Republic and EUR in Slovakia)."}},"required":["value","currency"],"description":"Total price for all pieces (including VAT)"},"unitPrice":{"type":"object","properties":{"value":{"type":"number","description":"Amount in minor units (13300 represents 133) [ISO 4217](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/ISO_4217)"},"currency":{"type":"string","description":"Amount currency [ISO 4217](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/ISO_4217). Only local currency is allowed (CZK in Czech Republic and EUR in Slovakia)."}},"required":["value","currency"],"description":"Price per one piece. If empty, automatically considered that `unitPrice` is `totalPrice` / `quantity`."},"producer":{"type":"string","description":"MUST NOT be longer than 50 characters."},"image":{"type":"object","properties":{"filename":{"type":"string","description":"File name."}},"required":["filename"],"oneOf":[{"properties":{"url":{"type":"string","description":"File URL (full)."}},"required":["url"]},{"properties":{"content":{"type":"string","description":"File content (Base64 encoded, maximum size of encoded string is 500kB)"}},"required":["content"]}],"description":"Item image"}},"required":["name","totalPrice"]},"description":"Order items"}},"required":["name"]},"description":"Array of merchant orders (usually consists of one order)"}},"required":["merchantOrders"],"description":"MUST be provided for `order.type` = `BROKERED`"}},"required":["type","totalPrice","financings"],"description":"Information about customer's purchase of goods. REQUIRED for ORDER type of Financed subject"}},"required":["type","order"],"description":"Subject of financing (for example IPhone purchase, loan for 20 000 CZK ...)"}},"required":["customer","originationContext","financedSubject"],"example":{"customer":{"type":"PERSON","person":{"firstName":"John","lastName":"Newborn","fullName":"Ing. John Newborn, Csc.","contacts":[{"type":"EMAIL","email":{"value":"john.newborn@country.com"},"mobile":{"countryCode":"+420","value":"777123456"},"phone":{"countryCode":"+420","value":"777123456"}}],"addresses":[{"city":"Prague","streetAddress":"Letensk├Ī","streetNumber":"22","zip":"140 00","flags":["PERMANENT"]}],"identificationNumber":"890619/5723","ipAddress":"172.10.10.1","fingerprintComponents":{"key":"property","value":"value"}},"entrepreneur":{"businessName":"Planeta s.r.o.","addresses":[{"city":"Prague","streetAddress":"Letensk├Ī","streetNumber":"22","zip":"140 00","flags":["PERMANENT"]}],"businessIdentificationNumber":"123456854","ipAddress":"172.10.10.1","fingerprintComponents":{"key":"property","value":"value"}},"legalEntity":{"businessName":"Planeta s.r.o.","addresses":[{"city":"Prague","streetAddress":"Letensk├Ī","streetNumber":"22","zip":"140 00","flags":["PERMANENT"]}],"businessIdentificationNumber":"123456854","ipAddress":"172.10.10.1","fingerprintComponents":{"key":"property","value":"value"}}},"originationContext":{"channel":{"type":"ONLINE","online":{"approvedRedirect":"https://www.partnereshop.cz","rejectedRedirect":"https://www.partnereshop.cz/kosik","notificationEndpoint":"https://www.partnereshop.cz/order/AA234"}},"precheckIds":[],"sourceId":"Cash_10_2020","extendedData":[{"key":"property","value":"value"}]},"financedSubject":{"type":"ORDER","order":{"type":"STANDARD","number":"11111111","specificSymbol":"1122334455","variableSymbol":"1234567","totalPrice":{"value":13300,"currency":"CZK"},"preferredDownPayment":{"value":13300,"currency":"CZK"},"financings":[{"type":"INSTALLMENT","amount":{"value":13300,"currency":"CZK"},"installment":{"preferredMonths":6,"preferredInstallment":{"value":13300,"currency":"CZK"},"productCode":"'COCONL06'","flags":["BUYBACK"]}}],"standard":{"deliveryType":"PERSONAL_BRANCH","reservationDate":"2017-07-15T00:00:00+02:00","items":[{"code":"EXC4677-1a","ean":"888462064002","name":"iPhone 6s 32GB SpaceGray","quantity":1,"type":"PHYSICAL","totalPrice":{"value":13300,"currency":"CZK"},"unitPrice":{"value":13300,"currency":"CZK"},"producer":"'Apple'","image":{"filename":"iphone6s.jpg","url":"https://i.cdn.nrholding.net/32523771/2000/2000/iphone6s.jpg"}}]},"brokered":{"merchantOrders":[{"number":"22222222","name":"MALL","logo":{"filename":"iphone6s.jpg","url":"https://i.cdn.nrholding.net/32523771/2000/2000/iphone6s.jpg"},"businessIdentificationNumber":26204967,"url":"www.mall.cz","deliveryType":"PERSONAL_BRANCH","reservationDate":"2017-07-15T00:00:00+02:00","items":[{"code":"EXC4677-1a","ean":"888462064002","name":"iPhone 6s 32GB SpaceGray","quantity":1,"type":"PHYSICAL","totalPrice":{"value":13300,"currency":"CZK"},"unitPrice":{"value":13300,"currency":"CZK"},"producer":"'Apple'","image":{"filename":"iphone6s.jpg","url":"https://i.cdn.nrholding.net/32523771/2000/2000/iphone6s.jpg"}}]}]}}}}},{"type":"object","properties":{"customer":{"type":"object","properties":{"type":{"type":"string","enum":["PERSON","ENTREPRENEUR","LEGAL_ENTITY"],"description":"Customer This specification of type of customer is REQUIRED."},"originationContext":{"type":"object","properties":{"channel":{"type":"object","properties":{"type":{"type":"string","enum":["ONLINE"],"description":"Type of origination channel"},"online":{"type":"object","properties":{"approvedRedirect":{"type":"string","description":"URL of the partner used for redirection of the customer back to partner website after the application approval. MUST be a valid URL according to [RFC 3986](https://tools.ietf.org/html/rfc3986). URL SHOULD contain scheme (for example `https://`) otherwise some browsers will not redirect customer correctly.  MUST NOT be longer than 1000 characters."},"rejectedRedirect":{"type":"string","description":"URL of the partner used for redirection of the customer back to partner website after application rejection. MUST be valid URL according to [RFC 3986](https://tools.ietf.org/html/rfc3986). URL SHOULD contain scheme (for example `https://`) otherwise some browsers will not redirect customer correctly. MUST NOT be longer than 1000 characters."},"notificationEndpoint":{"type":"string","description":"URL of the partner used as a notification endpoint for notifying partner about important updates in the application process (approval, rejection, cancellation, etc.). MUST be valid URL according to [RFC 3986](https://tools.ietf.org/html/rfc3986). URL SHOULD contain scheme (for example `https://`). MUST NOT be longer than 1000 characters."}},"description":"Collection of partner's URLs used for redirection of a customer back to a partner website or as a notification endpoint. REQUIRED for ONLINE channel type"}},"required":["type","online"],"description":"Origination channel"},"precheckIds":{"type":"array","items":{"type":"string"},"description":"Array of all precheck ids related to this application. If partner has run Precheck operation with this Customer's data he SHOULD provide precheckId into this attribute. SHOULD be valid precheckId. See Precheck operations and their's response."},"sourceId":{"type":"string","description":"Identifier of source or campaign of lead origin. Partner SHOULD provide valid `sourceId`"},"extendedData":{"type":"array","items":{"type":"object","properties":{"key":{"type":"string","description":"Key"},"value":{"type":"string","description":"Value"}},"required":["key","value"]},"description":"Additional data about application origin. List of supported `keys` for `extendedData`: `utm_source`, `utm_medium`, `utm_campaign`, `utm_term`, `utm_content`, `gclid`, `fbclid`, `url`."}},"required":["channel"],"description":"Additional information about the context of financing application origination (e.g. redirect URL back to partner site)"},"financedSubject":{"type":"object","properties":{"type":{"type":"string","enum":["ORDER"],"description":"Financed subject type"},"order":{"type":"object","properties":{"type":{"type":"string","enum":["STANDARD","BROKERED"],"description":"Type of order."},"number":{"type":"string","description":"Identifier, specified by the partner (e-shop, POS shop, inetmediary). MAY be provided for easier identification of application on partner's side. MUST NOT be longer than 100 characters."},"specificSymbol":{"type":"string","description":"Specific symbol (internal for partner) for reconciliation payment. MUST NOT be longer than 10 characters"},"variableSymbol":{"type":"string","description":"Variable symbol (internal for e-shop) for reconciliation payment. MUST NOT be longer than 10 characters. If empty, `order.number` is used instead. If not provided or not usable (e.g. `order.number` contains only letters) Home Credit internal identifier is used."},"totalPrice":{"type":"object","properties":{"value":{"type":"number","description":"Amount in minor units (13300 represents 133) [ISO 4217](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/ISO_4217)"},"currency":{"type":"string","description":"Amount currency [ISO 4217](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/ISO_4217). Only local currency is allowed (CZK in Czech Republic and EUR in Slovakia)."}},"required":["value","currency"],"description":"Total order amount, including VAT"},"preferredDownPayment":{"type":"object","properties":{"value":{"type":"number","description":"Amount in minor units (13300 represents 133) [ISO 4217](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/ISO_4217)"},"currency":{"type":"string","description":"Amount currency [ISO 4217](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/ISO_4217). Only local currency is allowed (CZK in Czech Republic and EUR in Slovakia)."}},"required":["value","currency"],"description":"Preferred down payment amount (amount SHOULD be rounded to hundreds CZK/ 5 EUR) (example: valid downpayment 35 EUR, invalid downpayment 32 EUR)"},"financings":{"type":"array","items":{"type":"object","properties":{"type":{"type":"string","enum":["INSTALLMENT"],"description":"Financing type"},"amount":{"type":"object","properties":{"value":{"type":"number","description":"Amount in minor units (13300 represents 133) [ISO 4217](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/ISO_4217)"},"currency":{"type":"string","description":"Amount currency [ISO 4217](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/ISO_4217). Only local currency is allowed (CZK in Czech Republic and EUR in Slovakia)."}},"required":["value","currency"],"description":"Financed amount for financing. MAY be provided for orders with only single financing. MUST be provided for orders with multiple financings."},"installment":{"type":"object","properties":{"preferredMonths":{"type":"number","description":"Preferred number of installments (in months)"},"preferredInstallment":{"type":"object","properties":{"value":{"type":"number","description":"Amount in minor units (13300 represents 133) [ISO 4217](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/ISO_4217)"},"currency":{"type":"string","description":"Amount currency [ISO 4217](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/ISO_4217). Only local currency is allowed (CZK in Czech Republic and EUR in Slovakia)."}},"required":["value","currency"],"description":"Preferred down payment amount (amount should be rounded to hundreds CZK/ 5 EUR)"},"productCode":{"type":"string","description":"Product code (obtained from calculation result)."},"flags":{"type":"array","items":{"type":"string","enum":["BUYBACK"]},"description":"Type of installment program. Used typically with multiple financings."}},"description":"Settings for INSTALLMENT Financing type. REQUIRED for INSTALLMENT financing type."}},"required":["type","installment"]},"description":"Information about form of financing ORDER application. MUST be provided with at least `type` of `financing` for orders with only single financing. MUST be provided with at least `amount` and `type` for particular `financing` parts for orders with multiple financings (typically more complicated product, for example Iphone purchase with future buyback)."},"standard":{"type":"object","properties":{"deliveryType":{"type":"string","enum":["PERSONAL_BRANCH","PERSONAL_PARTNER","ONLINE","DELIVERY_CARRIER"],"description":"Type of service used for goods delivery"},"reservationDate":{"type":"string","description":"Date and time until order is reserved. Until `reservationDate` HCO will try to notify partner with Application notification about approval or rejection.After this date and time, e-shop does not guarantee items availability (if application processing is longer, it may endanger order fullfillment)."},"items":{"type":"array","items":{"type":"object","properties":{"code":{"type":"string","description":"Internal code for item (internal to e-shop). Used to better identify the item for future changes. Maximum 100 characters"},"ean":{"type":"string","description":"EAN code. Maximum 32 characters"},"name":{"type":"string","description":"Item name. String values longer than 60 characters will be shortened to 60 characters."},"quantity":{"type":"number","description":"Item quantity. If empty, considered as 1."},"type":{"type":"string","enum":["PHYSICAL","DISCOUNT","SHIPPING_FEE","SALES_TAX","DIGITAL","GIFT_CARD","STORE_CREDIT","FEE","INSURANCE"],"description":"Item type"},"totalPrice":{"type":"object","properties":{"value":{"type":"number","description":"Amount in minor units (13300 represents 133) [ISO 4217](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/ISO_4217)"},"currency":{"type":"string","description":"Amount currency [ISO 4217](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/ISO_4217). Only local currency is allowed (CZK in Czech Republic and EUR in Slovakia)."}},"required":["value","currency"],"description":"Total price for all pieces (including VAT)"},"unitPrice":{"type":"object","properties":{"value":{"type":"number","description":"Amount in minor units (13300 represents 133) [ISO 4217](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/ISO_4217)"},"currency":{"type":"string","description":"Amount currency [ISO 4217](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/ISO_4217). Only local currency is allowed (CZK in Czech Republic and EUR in Slovakia)."}},"required":["value","currency"],"description":"Price per one piece. If empty, automatically considered that `unitPrice` is `totalPrice` / `quantity`."},"producer":{"type":"string","description":"MUST NOT be longer than 50 characters."},"image":{"type":"object","properties":{"filename":{"type":"string","description":"File name."}},"required":["filename"],"oneOf":[{"properties":{"url":{"type":"string","description":"File URL (full)."}},"required":["url"]},{"properties":{"content":{"type":"string","description":"File content (Base64 encoded, maximum size of encoded string is 500kB)"}},"required":["content"]}],"description":"Item image"}},"required":["name","totalPrice"]},"description":"Order items, MUST contain at least one item"}},"required":["items"],"description":"MUST be provided for `order.type` = `STANDARD`"},"brokered":{"type":"object","properties":{"merchantOrders":{"type":"array","items":{"type":"object","properties":{"number":{"type":"string","description":"Internal order number of the merchant (e-shop, POS shop), MAY be provided for easier identification of application on partner's side, MUST NOT be longer than 100 characters."},"name":{"type":"string","description":"Merchant name, MUST NOT be longer than 60 characters"},"logo":{"type":"object","properties":{"filename":{"type":"string","description":"File name."}},"required":["filename"],"oneOf":[{"properties":{"url":{"type":"string","description":"File URL (full)."}},"required":["url"]},{"properties":{"content":{"type":"string","description":"File content (Base64 encoded, maximum size of encoded string is 500kB)"}},"required":["content"]}],"description":"Merchant's logo"},"businessIdentificationNumber":{"type":"number","description":"Business identification number, MUST NOT be longer than 8 digits"},"url":{"type":"string","description":"`URL of the merchant's`web site (e-shop), MUST NOT be longer than 1000 characte`s, MUST be valid URL"},"deliveryType":{"type":"string","enum":["PERSONAL_BRANCH","PERSONAL_PARTNER","ONLINE","DELIVERY_CARRIER"],"description":"Type of service used for goods delivery"},"reservationDate":{"type":"string","description":"Date and time until order is reserved. String values longer than 60 characters will be shortened to 60 characters."},"quantity":{"type":"number","description":"Item quantity. If empty, considered as 1."},"type":{"type":"string","enum":["PHYSICAL","DISCOUNT","SHIPPING_FEE","SALES_TAX","DIGITAL","GIFT_CARD","STORE_CREDIT","FEE","INSURANCE"],"description":"Item type"},"totalPrice":{"type":"object","properties":{"value":{"type":"number","description":"Amount in minor units (13300 represents 133) [ISO 4217](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/ISO_4217)"},"currency":{"type":"string","description":"Amount currency [ISO 4217](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/ISO_4217). Only local currency is allowed (CZK in Czech Republic and EUR in Slovakia)."}},"required":["value","currency"],"description":"Total price for all pieces (including VAT)"},"unitPrice":{"type":"object","properties":{"value":{"type":"number","description":"Amount in minor units (13300 represents 133) [ISO 4217](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/ISO_4217)"},"currency":{"type":"string","description":"Amount currency [ISO 4217](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/ISO_4217). Only local currency is allowed (CZK in Czech Republic and EUR in Slovakia)."}},"required":["value","currency"],"description":"Price per one piece. If empty, automatically considered that `unitPrice` is `totalPrice` / `quantity`."},"producer":{"type":"string","description":"MUST NOT be longer than 50 characters."},"image":{"type":"object","properties":{"filename":{"type":"string","description":"File name."}},"required":["filename"],"oneOf":[{"properties":{"url":{"type":"string","description":"File URL (full)."}},"required":["url"]},{"properties":{"content":{"type":"string","description":"File content (Base64 encoded, maximum size of encoded string is 500kB)"}},"required":["content"]}],"description":"Item image"}},"required":["name","totalPrice"]},"description":"Order items"}},"required":["name"]},"description":"Array of merchant orders (usually consists of one order)"}},"required":["merchantOrders"],"description":"MUST be provided for `order.type` = `BROKERED`"}},"required":["type","totalPrice","financings"],"description":"Information about customer's purchase of goods. REQUIRED for ORDER type of Financed subject"}},"required":["type","order"],"description":"Subject of financing (for example IPhone purchase, loan for 20 000 CZK ...)"}},"required":["customer","originationContext","financedSubject"],"example":{"customer":{"type":"PERSON","person":{"firstName":"John","lastName":"Newborn","fullName":"Ing. John Newborn, Csc.","contacts":[{"type":"EMAIL","email":{"value":"john.newborn@country.com"},"mobile":{"countryCode":"+420","value":"777123456"},"phone":{"countryCode":"+420","value":"777123456"}}],"addresses":[{"city":"Prague","streetAddress":"Letensk├Ī","streetNumber":"22","zip":"140 00","flags":["PERMANENT"]}],"identificationNumber":"890619/5723","ipAddress":"172.10.10.1","fingerprintComponents":{"key":"property","value":"value"}},"entrepreneur":{"businessName":"Planeta 00","flags":["PERMANENT"]}],"businessIdentificationNumber":"123456854","ipAddress":"172.10.10.1","fingerprintComponents":{"key":"property","value":"value"}}},"originationContext":{"channel":{"type":"ONLINE","online":{"approvedRedirect":"https://www.partnereshop.cz","rejectedRedirect":"https://www.partnereshop.cz/kosik","notificationEndpoint":"https://www.partnereshop.cz/order/AA234"}},"precheckIds":[],"sourceId":"Cash_10_2020","extendedData":[{"key":"property","value":"value"}]},"financedSubject":{"type":"ORDER","order":{"type":"STANDARD","number":"11111111","specificSymbol":"1122334455","variableSymbol":"1234567","totalPrice":{"value":13300,"currency":"CZK"},"preferredDownPayment":{"value":13300,"currency":"CZK"},"financings":[{"type":"INSTALLMENT","amount":{"value":13300,"currency":"CZK"},"installment":{"preferredMonths":6,"preferredInstallment":{"value":13300,"currency":"CZK"},"productCode":"'COCONL06'","flags":["BUYBACK"]}}],"standard":{"deliveryType":"PERSONAL_BRANCH","reservationDate":"2017-07-15T00:00:00+02:00","items":[{"code":"EXC4677-1a","ean":"888462064002","name":"iPhone 6s 32GB SpaceGray","quantity":1,"type":"PHYSICAL","totalPrice":{"value":13300,"currency":"CZK"},"unitPrice":{"value":13300,"currency":"CZK"},"producer":"'Apple'","image":{"filename":"iphone6s.jpg","url":"https://i.cdn.nrholding.net/32523771/2000/2000/iphone6s.jpg"}}]},"brokered":{"merchantOrders":[{"number":"22222222","name":"MALL","logo":{"filename":"iphone6s.jpg","url":"https://i.cdn.nrholding.net/32523771/2000/2000/iphone6s.jpg"},"businessIdentificationNumber":26204967,"url":"www.mall.cz","deliveryType":"PERSONAL_BRANCH","reservationDate":"2017-07-15T00:00:00+02:00","items":[{"code":"EXC4677-1a","ean":"888462064002","name":"iPhone 6s 32GB SpaceGray","quantity":1,"type":"PHYSICAL","totalPrice":{"value":13300,"currency":"CZK"},"unitPrice":{"value":13300,"currency":"CZK"},"producer":"'Apple'","image":{"filename":"iphone6s.jpg","url":"https://i.cdn.nrholding.net/32523771/2000/2000/iphone6s.jpg"}}]}]}}}}},{"type":"object","properties":{"customer":{"type":"object","properties":{"type":{"type":"string","enum":["PERSON","ENTREPRENEUR","LEGAL_ENTITY"],"description":"Customer type"},"person":{"type":"object","properties":{"firstName":{"type":"string","description":"Customer first (given) name. Name SHOULD follow regular expression `^[A-Z├ü-┼Į]'?[- \\u00A0a-zA-Z├Ī-┼Š├ü-┼Į]*[a-zA-Z├Ī-┼Š├ü-┼Į]$`, SHOULD be 2 to 30 characters long and characters SHOULD be in the `ISO 8859-2` character set."},"lastName":{"type":"string","description":"Customer last (family) name. Name SHOULD follow regular expression `^[A-Z├ü-┼Į]'?[- \\u00A0a-zA-Z├Ī-┼Š├ü-┼Į]*[a-zA-Z├Ī-┼Š├ü-┼Į]$`,SHOULD be 2 to 30 characters long and characters SHOULD be in the `ISO 8859-2` character set."},"fullName":{"type":"string","description":"Customer full name, including academical degrees and salutation. Attribute `fullName` is parsed (and eventually shortened) into `firstName` and `lastName`; `fullName` is never returned in response. In case all three attributes are provided, `fullName` is discarded. Full name SHOULD be no longer than 100 characters and characters SHOULD be in the `ISO 8859-2` character set"},"contacts":{"type":"array","description":"Contacts of person.","items":{}},"addresses":{"type":"array","items":{"type":"object","properties":{"city":{"type":"string","description":"City. String values longer than 100 characters will be shortened to 100 characters."},"streetAddress":{"type":"string","description":"Street/city part. String values longer than 100 characters will be shortened to 100 characters."},"streetNumber":{"type":"string","description":"Street number. String values longer than 50 characters will be shortened to 50 characters."},"zip":{"type":"string","description":"Postal code. String values longer than 10 characters will be shortened to 10 characters."},"flags":{"type":"array","items":{"type":"string","enum":["PERMANENT","CONTACT"]},"description":"Types of the address."}}},"description":"Addresses."},"identificationNumber":{"type":"string","description":"Customer's identification number (actually birth number). SHOULD be valid according to the legislation currently in effect. Customer MUST be at least 18 years old."},"ipAddress":{"type":"string","description":"IPv4 or IPv6 address of a customer."},"fingerprintComponents":{"type":"object","properties":{"key":{"type":"string","description":"Key"},"value":{"type":"string","description":"Value"}},"required":["key","value"],"description":"Fingerprints components."}},"description":"REQUIRED for `PERSON` Customer type. If known, customer data MAY be included for a smoother approval process for defined type of customer"},"entrepreneur":{"type":"object","properties":{"businessName":{"type":"string","description":"Name of business company."},"addresses":{"type":"array","items":{"type":"object","properties":{"city":{"type":"string","description":"City. String values longer than 100 characters will be shortened to 100 characters."},"streetAddress":{"type":"string","description":"Street/city part. String values longer than 100 characters will be shortened to 100 characters."},"streetNumber":{"type":"string","description":"Street number. String values longer than 50 characters will be shortened to 50 characters."},"zip":{"type":"string","description":"Postal code. String values longer than 10 characters will be shortened to 10 characters."},"flags":{"type":"array","items":{"type":"string","enum":["PERMANENT","CONTACT"]},"description":"Types of the address."}}},"description":"Addresses."},"businessIdentificationNumber":{"type":"string","description":"Company's identification number (known as I─īO)."},"ipAddress":{"type":"string","description":"IPv4 or IPv6 address of a customer."},"fingerprintComponents":{"type":"object","properties":{"key":{"type":"string","description":"Key"},"value":{"type":"string","description":"Value"}},"required":["key","value"],"description":"Fingerprints components."}},"description":"REQUIRED for `ENTREPRENEUR` Customer type. If known, customer data MAY be included for a smoother approval process for defined type of customer"},"legalEntity":{"type":"object","properties":{"businessName":{"type":"string","description":"Name of business company."},"addresses":{"type":"array","items":{"type":"object","properties":{"city":{"type":"string","description":"City. String values longer than 100 characters will be shortened to 100 characters."},"streetAddress":{"type":"string","description":"Street/city part. String values longer than 100 characters will be shortened to 100 characters."},"streetNumber":{"type":"string","description":"Street number. String values longer than 50 characters will be shortened to 50 characters."},"zip":{"type":"string","description":"Postal code. String values longer than 10 characters will be shortened to 10 characters."},"flags":{"type":"array","items":{"type":"string","enum":["PERMANENT","CONTACT"]},"description":"Types of the address."}}},"description":"Addresses."},"businessIdentificationNumber":{"type":"string","description":"Company's identification number (known as I─īO)."},"ipAddress":{"type":"string","description":"IPv4 or IPv6 address of a customer."},"fingerprintComponents":{"type":"object","properties":{"key":{"type":"string","description":"Key"},"value":{"type":"string","description":"Value"}},"required":["key","value"],"description":"Fingerprints components."}},"description":"REQUIRED for `LEGAL_ENTITY` Customer type. If known, customer data MAY be included for a smoother approval process for defined type of customer"}},"required":["type"],"description":"Customer data. This specification of type of customer is REQUIRED."},"originationContext":{"type":"object","properties":{"channel":{"type":"object","properties":{"type":{"type":"string","enum":["ONLINE"],"description":"Type of origination channel"},"online":{"type":"object","properties":{"approvedRedirect":{"type":"string","description":"URL of the partner used for redirection of the customer back to partner website after the application approval. MUST be a valid URL according to [RFC 3986](https://tools.ietf.org/html/rfc3986). URL SHOULD contain scheme (for example `https://`) otherwise some browsers will not redirect customer correctly.  MUST NOT be longer than 1000 characters."},"rejectedRedirect":{"type":"string","description":"URL of the partner used for redirection of the customer back to partner website after application rejection. MUST be valid URL according to [RFC 3986](https://tools.ietf.org/html/rfc3986). URL SHOULD contain scheme (for example `https://`) otherwise some browsers will not redirect customer correctly. MUST NOT be longer than 1000 characters."},"notificationEndpoint":{"type":"string","description":"URL of the partner used as a notification endpoint for notifying partner about important updates in the application process (approval, rejection, cancellation, etc.). MUST be valid URL according to [RFC 3986](https://tools.ietf.org/html/rfc3986). URL SHOULD contain scheme (for example `https://`). MUST NOT be longer than 1000 characters."}},"description":"Collection of partner's URLs used for redirection of a customer back to a partner website or as a notification endpoint. REQUIRED for ONLINE channel type"}},"required":["type","online"],"description":"Origination channel"},"precheckIds":{"type":"array","items":{"type":"string"},"description":"Array of all precheck ids related to this application. If partner has run Precheck operation with this Customer's data he SHOULD provide precheckId into this attribute. SHOULD be valid precheckId. See Precheck operations and their's response."},"sourceId":{"type":"string","description":"Identifier of source or campaign of lead origin. Partner SHOULD provide valid `sourceId`"},"extendedData":{"type":"array","items":{"type":"object","properties":{"key":{"type":"string","description":"Key"},"value":{"type":"string","description":"Value"}},"required":["key","value"]},"description":"Additional data about application origin. List of supported `keys` for `extendedData`: `utm_source`, `utm_medium`, `utm_campaign`, `utm_term`, `utm_content`, `gclid`, `fbclid`, `url`."}},"required":["channel"],"description":"Additional information about the context of financing application origination (e.g. redirect URL back to partner site)"},"financedSubject":{"type":"object","properties":{"type":{"type":"string","enum":["ORDER"],"description":"Type of financed subject"},"order":{"type":"object","properties":{"type":{"type":"string","enum":["STANDARD","BROKERED"],"description":"Type of order."},"number":{"type":"string","description":"Identifier, specified by the partner (e-shop, POS shop, inetmediary). MAY be provided for easier identification of application on partner's side. MUST NOT be longer than 100 characters."},"specificSymbol":{"type":"string","description":"Specific symbol (internal for partner) for reconciliation payment. MUST NOT be longer than 10 characters"},"variableSymbol":{"type":"string","description":"Variable symbol (internal for e-shop) for reconciliation payment. MUST NOT be longer than 10 characters. If empty, `order.number` is used instead. If not provided or not usable (e.g. `order.number` contains only letters) Home Credit internal identifier is used."},"totalPrice":{"type":"object","properties":{"value":{"type":"number","description":"Amount in minor units (13300 represents 133) [ISO 4217](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/ISO_4217)"},"currency":{"type":"string","description":"Amount currency [ISO 4217](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/ISO_4217). content (Base64 encoded, maximum size of encoded string is 500kB)"}},"required":["content"]}],"description":"Merchant's logo"},"businessIdentificationNumber":{"type":"number","description":"Business identification number, MUST NOT be longer than 8 digits"},"url":{"type":"string","description":"`URL of the merchant's`web site (e-shop), MUST NOT be longer than 1000 characte`s, MUST be valid URL"},"deliveryType":{"type":"string","enum":["PERSONAL_BRANCH","PERSONAL_PARTNER","ONLINE","DELIVERY_CARRIER"],"description":"Type of service used for goods delivery"},"reservationDate":{"type":"string","description":"Date and time until order is reserved. Until `reservationDate` HCO will try to notify partner with Application notification about approval or rejection.After this date and time, e-shop does not guarantee items availability (if application processing is longer, it may endanger order fullfillment)."},"items":{"type":"array","items":{"type":"object","properties":{"code":{"type":"string","description":"Internal code for item (internal to e-shop). Used to better identify the item for future changes. Maximum 100 characters"},"ean":{"type":"string","description":"EAN code. Maximum 32 characters"},"name":{"type":"string","description":"Item name. String values longer than 60 characters will be shortened to 60 characters."},"quantity":{"type":"number","description":"Item quantity. If empty, considered as 1."},"type":{"type":"string","enum":["PHYSICAL","DISCOUNT","SHIPPING_FEE","SALES_TAX","DIGITAL","GIFT_CARD","STORE_CREDIT","FEE","INSURANCE"],"description":"Item type"},"totalPrice":{"type":"object","properties":{"value":{"type":"number","description":"Amount in minor units (13300 represents 133) [ISO 4217](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/ISO_4217)"},"currency":{"type":"string","description":"Amount currency [ISO 4217](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/ISO_4217). Only local currency is allowed (CZK in Czech Republic and EUR in Slovakia)."}},"required":["value","currency"],"description":"Total price for all pieces (including VAT)"},"unitPrice":{"type":"object","properties":{"value":{"type":"number","description":"Amount in minor units (13300 represents 133) [ISO 4217](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/ISO_4217)"},"currency":{"type":"string","description":"Amount currency [ISO 4217](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/ISO_4217). Only local currency is allowed (CZK in Czech Republic and EUR in Slovakia)."}},"required":["value","currency"],"description":"Price per one piece. If empty, automatically considered that `unitPrice` is `totalPrice` / `quantity`."},"producer":{"type":"string","description":"MUST NOT be longer than 50 characters."},"image":{"type":"object","properties":{"filename":{"type":"string","description":"File name."}},"required":["filename"],"oneOf":[{"properties":{"url":{"type":"string","description":"File URL (full)."}},"required":["url"]},{"properties":{"content":{"type":"string","description":"File content (Base64 encoded, maximum size of encoded string is 500kB)"}},"required":["content"]}],"description":"Item image"}},"required":["name","totalPrice"]},"description":"Order items"}},"required":["name"]},"description":"Array of merchant orders (usually consists of one order)"}},"required":["merchantOrders"],"description":"MUST be provided for `order.type` = `BROKERED`"}},"required":["type","totalPrice","financings"],"description":"Information about customer's purchase of goods. REQUIRED for ORDER type of Financed subject"}},"required":["type","order"],"description":"Subject of financing (for example IPhone purchase, loan for 20 000 CZK ...)"}},"required":["customer","originationContext","financedSubject"],"example":{"customer":{"type":"PERSON","person":{"firstName":"John","lastName":"Newborn","fullName":"Ing. John Newborn, Csc.","contacts":[{"type":"EMAIL","email":{"value":"john.newborn@country.com"},"mobile":{"countryCode":"+420","value":"777123456"},"phone":{"countryCode":"+420","value":"777123456"}}],"addresses":[{"city":"Prague","streetAddress":"Letensk├Ī","streetNumber":"22","zip":"140 00","flags":["PERMANENT"]}],"identificationNumber":"890619/5723","ipAddress":"172.10.10.1","fingerprintComponents":{"key":"property","value":"value"}},"entrepreneur":{"businessName":"Planeta s.r.o.","addresses":[{"city":"Prague","streetAddress":"Letensk├Ī","streetNumber":"22","zip":"140 00","flags":["PERMANENT"]}],"businessIdentificationNumber":"123456854","ipAddress":"172.10.10.1","fingerprintComponents":{"key":"property","value":"value"}},"legalEntity":{"businessName":"Planeta s.r.o.","addresses":[{"city":"Prague","streetAddress":"Letensk├Ī","streetNumber":"22","zip":"140 00","flags":["PERMANENT"]}],"businessIdentificationNumber":"123456854","ipAddress":"172.10.10.1","fingerprintComponents":{"key":"property","value":"value"}}},"originationContext":{"channel":{"type":"ONLINE","online":{"approvedRedirect":"https://www.partnereshop.cz","rejectedRedirect":"https://www.partnereshop.cz/kosik","notificationEndpoint":"https://www.partnereshop.cz/order/AA234"}},"precheckIds":[],"sourceId":"Cash_10_2020","extendedData":[{"key":"property","value":"value"}]},"financedSubject":{"type":"INVALID_TYPE","order":{"type":"STANDARD","number":"11111111","specificSymbol":"1122334455","variableSymbol":"1234567","totalPrice":{"value":13300,"currency":"CZK"},"preferredDownPayment":{"value":13300,"currency":"CZK"},"financings":[{"type":"INSTALLMENT","amount":{"value":13300,"currency":"CZK"},"installment":{"preferredMonths":6,"preferredInstallment":{"value":13300,"currency":"CZK"},"productCode":"'COCONL06'","flags":["BUYBACK"]}}],"standard":{"deliveryType":"PERSONAL_BRANCH","reservationDate":"2017-07-15T00:00:00+02:00","items":[{"code":"EXC4677-1a","ean":"888462064002","name":"iPhone 6s 32GB SpaceGray","quantity":1,"type":"PHYSICAL","totalPrice":{"value":13300,"currency":"CZK"},"unitPrice":{"value":13300,"currency":"CZK"},"producer":"'Apple'","image":{"filename":"iphone6s.jpg","url":"https://i.cdn.nrholding.net/32523771/2000/2000/iphone6s.jpg"}}]},"brokered":{"merchantOrders":[{"number":"22222222","name":"MALL","logo":{"filename":"iphone6s.jpg","url":"https://i.cdn.nrholding.net/32523771/2000/2000/iphone6s.jpg"},"businessIdentificationNumber":26204967,"url":"www.mall.cz","deliveryType":"PERSONAL_BRANCH","reservationDate":"2017-07-15T00:00:00+02:00","items":[{"code":"EXC4677-1a","ean":"888462064002","name":"iPhone 6s 32GB SpaceGray","quantity":1,"type":"PHYSICAL","totalPrice":{"value":13300,"currency":"CZK"},"unitPrice":{"value":13300,"currency":"CZK"},"producer":"'Apple'","image":{"filename":"iphone6s.jpg","url":"https://i.cdn.nrholding.net/32523771/2000/2000/iphone6s.jpg"}}]}]}}}}}]}}}}}
>
  
</RequestSchema>

<StatusCodes
  id={undefined}
  label={undefined}
  responses={{"200":{"description":"Application was created in the past (nothing changed)","headers":{},"content":{"application/json;charset=UTF-8":{"schema":{"type":"object","properties":{"id":{"type":"string","description":"Primary identifier of the application"},"status":{"type":"string","enum":["CREATED","PRESCORED","ALTERNATIVE","VERIFICATION","APPROVED","CONFIRMED","REJECTED","CANCELLED"],"description":"Application status"},"workflowSteps":{"type":"array","items":{"type":"object","properties":{"code":{"type":"string","enum":["REDIRECT","DELIVERY","CANCELLATION"],"description":"Workflow code"},"priority":{"type":"number","description":"Identifier of workflow step's priority expressed as number (lowest number means highest priority)"},"mandatory":{"type":"boolean","description":"Available workflow step for current application in application process."},"redirect":{"type":"object","properties":{"gatewayRedirectUrl":{"type":"string","description":"Gateway redirect URL. Partner SHOULD redirect customer to this address for continuation of application approval process."}},"required":["gatewayRedirectUrl"],"description":"Data for workflow step `REDIRECT`"}},"required":["code","priority","mandatory"]},"description":"Collection of currently available application process actions."}},"required":["id","status"]},"examples":{"response":{"value":{"id":"123e4567-e89b-12d3-a456-426655440000","status":"CREATED","workflowSteps":[{"code":"REDIRECT","priority":1,"mandatory":true,"redirect":{"gatewayRedirectUrl":"https://nasplatky.homecredit.cz"}}]}}}}}},"201":{"description":"Application was created","headers":{},"content":{"application/json;charset=UTF-8":{"schema":{"type":"object","properties":{"id":{"type":"string","description":"Primary identifier of the application"},"status":{"type":"string","enum":["CREATED","PRESCORED","ALTERNATIVE","VERIFICATION","APPROVED","CONFIRMED","REJECTED","CANCELLED"],"description":"Application status"},"workflowSteps":{"type":"array","items":{"type":"object","properties":{"code":{"type":"string","enum":["REDIRECT","DELIVERY","CANCELLATION"],"description":"Workflow code"},"priority":{"type":"number","description":"Identifier of workflow step's priority expressed as number (lowest number means highest priority)"},"mandatory":{"type":"boolean","description":"Available workflow step for current application in application process."},"redirect":{"type":"object","properties":{"gatewayRedirectUrl":{"type":"string","description":"Gateway redirect URL. Partner SHOULD redirect customer to this address for continuation of application approval process."}},"required":["gatewayRedirectUrl"],"description":"Data for workflow step `REDIRECT`"}},"required":["code","priority","mandatory"]},"description":"Collection of currently available application process actions."}},"required":["id","status"]},"examples":{"response":{"value":{"id":"123e4567-e89b-12d3-a456-426655440000","status":"CREATED","workflowSteps":[{"code":"REDIRECT","priority":1,"mandatory":true,"redirect":{"gatewayRedirectUrl":"https://nasplatky.homecredit.cz"}}]}}}}}},"400":{"description":"There was an error processing request - invalid financedSubject.type","headers":{},"content":{"application/json;charset=UTF-8":{"schema":{"type":"object","properties":{"errors":{"type":"array","items":{"type":"object","properties":{"code":{"type":"string","description":"Unique internal error code"},"message":{"type":"string","description":"Human readable error description (non-localized)"},"severity":{"type":"string","enum":["ERROR","WARN","INFO"]},"attribute":{"type":"string","description":"JSON path of request attribute that caused the error (if applicable)"},"ticketId":{"type":"string","description":"Internal ticket ID, used for error backtracking"}},"required":["code","message","severity"]},"description":"Array with errors"}},"required":["errors"]},"examples":{"response":{"value":{"errors":[{"code":"BAD_REQUEST","message":"Bad request","severity":"ERROR","attribute":"customer.addresses[1].streetNumber","ticketId":"UAT1:AMS:20160516-091658.450:45e4"}]}}}}}}}}
>
  
</StatusCodes>
